name: ShadowCoerce
summary: ShadowCoerce is a Python PoC that uses the MS-FSRVP (File Server Remote VSS Protocol) to coerce Windows hosts to authenticate to a remote listener. Companion to PetitPotam and DFSCoerce.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.
